summary: Google BigQuery agent analytics sample dataset for AI agent monitoring. Columns include timestamp, event type, agent name, session ID, invocation ID, user ID, content, and error message.
America's Health Rankings data from the United Health Foundation. Columns include edition, report type, measure name, state name, subpopulation, value, confidence intervals, source, and source date.

Austin 311 service requests available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unique key, complaint description, source, status, status change date, created date, last update date, close date, incident address, and street number.

Austin B-cycle bikeshare station data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include station ID, name, status, location, address, alternate name, city asset number, property type, number of docks, and power type.

Austin crime incident data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unique key, address, census tract, clearance date, clearance status, council district code, description, district, latitude, and longitude.
Austin EMS or police incident records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unique key, description, date, time, address, longitude, latitude, location, and timestamp.
Austin solid waste disposal load records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include load ID, report date, load type, load time, load weight, dropoff site, route type, and route number.

Baseball game statistics available via Google BigQuery. Columns include game ID, season ID, season type, year, start time, game status, attendance, day/night indicator, duration, and duration in minutes.
BBC News article corpus available via Google BigQuery for text classification. Columns include body, title, filename, and category.

NCAA college basketball game statistics available via Google BigQuery from BigQueryML. Columns include game ID, season, scheduled date, home team, school name, team ID, conference name, division name, minutes, and points.

Bitcoin blockchain transaction and block data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block ID, previous block hash, Merkle root, timestamp, difficulty target, nonce, version, work in terahash, work error, and transactions.
Astronomical blackhole database available via Google BigQuery. Columns include name, right ascension, declination, redshift, plate, fiber, MJD, target flag, and number of spectroscopic observations.
Ethereum mainnet blockchain analytics data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include address, code hash, code, contract indicator, block hash, block number, block timestamp, nonce, and balance.

U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) time series data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include series ID, year, period, value, footnote codes, survey abbreviation, seasonal code, periodicity code, area code, and area name.

BLS Quarterly Census of Employment and Wages (QCEW) data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include GEOID, area FIPS, and quarterly establishment counts, average weekly wages, monthly employment levels, and location quotients by industry sector.
Breathe respiratory health research paper dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include title, authors, abstract, date, arxiv source, acquisition date, citations, link, PDF link, and ID.

BroadStreet Area Deprivation Index (ADI) data by census block group available via Google BigQuery. Columns include geo ID, state/county/block group FIPS codes, description, county name, state name, state, year, and area deprivation index percentile.

Catalonian mobile network coverage measurements available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, hour, latitude, longitude, signal strength, network type, operator, status, description, and network identifier.

European mobile network coverage measurements available via Google BigQuery (EU region). Columns include date, hour, latitude, longitude, signal strength, network type, operator, status, description, and network identifier.

U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS) data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include geo ID, family and nonfamily household counts, median year structure built, rent burden categories, and housing tenure variables.

U.S. Census Bureau construction statistics available via Google BigQuery. Columns include period ID, period name, period date, category ID/code/description, category indent level, datatype ID/code/description.

U.S. Census Bureau international demographic and fertility data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country code, country name, year, and fertility rates by five-year age groups from 15-19 through 45-49.
U.S. Census Bureau population data by ZIP code and age/gender available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ZIP code, geo ID, minimum age, maximum age, gender, and population count.

Census Opportunity Atlas economic mobility data by census tract available via Google BigQuery. Columns include state, county, tract, commuting zone, mean household income in 2000, mean commute time, college attainment rates, and foreign-born share.

U.S. Census FIPS code reference table available via Google BigQuery. Columns include FIPS class code, description, summary level, summary level name, state/county/place/subdivision FIPS codes, and area name.

Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) consumer complaint database available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date received, product, subproduct, issue, subissue, consumer narrative, company public response, company name, state, and ZIP code.

Chicago crime incident data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unique key, case number, date, block, IUCR code, primary type, description, location description, arrest indicator, and domestic indicator.

Chicago taxi trip records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unique key, taxi ID, trip start/end timestamps, trip seconds, trip miles, pickup/dropoff census tract, and pickup/dropoff community area.
Clemson DICE computer vision detection dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include targets, timestamp, frame, detections, and ID.

Google Cloud Storage satellite imagery geo index available via Google BigQuery. Columns include scene ID, product ID, spacecraft ID, sensor ID, date acquired, sensing time, collection number, collection category, data type, and WRS path.
CMS Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) codes available via Google BigQuery. Columns include HCPC code, sequence number, record ID, long description, short description, and price tiers.

CMS Medicare home health agency claims data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include provider ID, agency name, address, city, state, ZIP code, total episodes, distinct users, total charge amount, and total Medicare payment amount.

CMS synthetic patient data in OMOP clinical data model available via Google BigQuery. Columns include care site ID/name, place of service concept, location ID, source values, concept ID/name, domain ID, and vocabulary ID.
International country codes reference table available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country name, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code, and alpha-3 code.

COVID-19 American Hospital Association hospital bed capacity data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include county FIPS code, county name, state name, CBSA code, total hospital beds, and bed counts by specialty care type.

COVID-19 Tracking Project state-level daily test and case counts available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, state, admin level, tests increase/total/pending, positive case increase/total, and negative case increase/total.

COVID-19 ECDC (European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control) global daily case and death counts available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, day, month, year, daily confirmed cases, daily deaths, cumulative confirmed cases, deaths, country name, and geo ID.

COVID-19 ECDC global daily case and death counts (EU region) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, day, month, year, daily confirmed cases, daily deaths, cumulative cases, deaths, country name, and geo ID.

COVID-19 genome sequence metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include accession, assay type, center name, consent, experiment, sample name, instrument, library layout, library selection, and library source.

COVID-19 Geotab mobility impact data for airports and cities available via Google BigQuery. Columns include aggregation method, date, version, airport name, percent of baseline traffic, center point geometry, city, state/region, and country.

COVID-19 Geotab mobility impact data for airports and cities (EU region) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include aggregation method, date, version, airport name, percent of baseline traffic, center point geometry, city, state/region, and country.

COVID-19 Google mobility trends showing visits to places by category available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country region code, country region, sub-regions, metro area, ISO codes, census FIPS code, place ID, date, and retail/recreation percent change from baseline.

COVID-19 Google mobility trends for EU region showing visits to places by category available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country region code, country region, sub-regions, metro area, ISO codes, census FIPS code, place ID, date, and percent change from baseline.

COVID-19 government policy response dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country name, alpha-3 code, region name/code, date, school closing status/flags/notes, and workplace closing status/flags.

COVID-19 Italy regional and provincial case data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, country, region code, province code, province name, province abbreviation, latitude, longitude, and location geometry.

COVID-19 Italy regional and provincial case data (EU region) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, country, region code, province code, province name, province abbreviation, latitude, longitude, and location geometry.

COVID-19 Johns Hopkins CSSE global confirmed cases and deaths time series available via Google BigQuery. Columns include province/state, country/region, latitude, longitude, location geometry, and daily case counts from January 2020.

COVID-19 Johns Hopkins CSSE global case data (EU region) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include province/state, country/region, latitude, longitude, location geometry, and daily case counts from January 2020.
COVID-19 New York Times excess mortality data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country, place name, frequency, start/end dates, year, month, week, deaths, and expected deaths.

COVID-19 Open Data global case and outcome data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include province/state, country/region, date, latitude, longitude, sub-region name, location geometry, confirmed cases, deaths, and recovered counts.

COVID-19 Open Data global cases (EU region) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include province/state, country/region, date, latitude, longitude, sub-region name, location geometry, confirmed cases, deaths, and recovered counts.

COVID-19 county-level public forecast data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include county FIPS code, county name, state name, forecast date, prediction date, new confirmed cases, cumulative confirmed, 7-day rolling average, new deaths, and cumulative deaths.

COVID-19 county-level public forecast data (Asia Northeast 1 region) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include county FIPS code, county name, state name, forecast date, prediction date, new confirmed, cumulative confirmed, 7-day rolling, new deaths, and cumulative deaths.
COVID-19 RxRx19 cell imaging dataset metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include site ID and 384 image features (feature_0 through feature_383).

COVID-19 Google symptom search trends available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country/region codes, sub-region 1 and 2 codes, place ID, date, and search interest scores for symptoms including abdominal obesity and abdominal pain.

COVID-19 racial equity data tracking cases by race available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, state, location, city/county, and case counts for White, Black, Latinx, Asian, American Indian/Alaska Native, and other racial groups.
COVID-19 USAFacts county-level cumulative case data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include county FIPS code, county name, state, state FIPS code, and daily case counts from January 2020.

COVID-19 vaccination site accessibility data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include facility place ID, provider ID, name, latitude, longitude, country region, country region code, sub-region 1 and 2 names and codes.
COVID-19 Google vaccination search insights available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, country region, country region code, sub-regions 1-3 with codes, and place ID.

COVID-19 WeatherSource weather forecast data by county available via Google BigQuery. Columns include county FIPS code, country, initiation time, forecast date, forecast day of year, min/avg/max temperature, and min/avg relative humidity.

Crypto Aptos mainnet blockchain block and transaction data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block hash, block timestamp, Unix timestamp, block height, transaction version, round, proposer, and block votes bitvec.

Crypto Aptos testnet blockchain block and transaction data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block hash, block timestamp, Unix timestamp, block height, transaction version, round, proposer, and block votes bitvec.
Crypto Band Protocol blockchain event data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block height, block timestamp, timestamp truncated, event type, block event type, attributes, and block hash.

Bitcoin blockchain block and transaction data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block hash, size, stripped size, weight, block number, version, Merkle root, timestamp, timestamp month, and nonce.

Bitcoin Cash blockchain block and transaction data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block hash, size, stripped size, weight, block number, version, Merkle root, timestamp, timestamp month, and nonce.

Ethereum blockchain address balances and block data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include address, token symbol, token name, decimals, ETH balance, timestamp, block number, hash, and parent hash.

Ethereum Classic blockchain block and account data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include address, ETH balance, timestamp, block number, hash, parent hash, nonce, SHA3 uncles, logs bloom, and transactions root.
IoTeX blockchain transaction data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include version, nonce, gas limit, gas price, sender, status, block height, hash, timestamp, and gas consumed.

Litecoin blockchain block and transaction data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block hash, size, stripped size, weight, block number, version, Merkle root, timestamp, timestamp month, and nonce.

MultiversX (formerly Elrond) mainnet blockchain account data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, address, username, balance, numeric balance, nonce, shard ID, timestamp, developer rewards, and numeric developer rewards.

NEAR Protocol mainnet blockchain receipt and account impact data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block date, height, timestamp, timestamp UTC, block hash, chunk hash, index in block, affected account ID, and transaction/receipt hashes.
Polkadot cryptocurrency blockchain data available via Google BigQuery. No column details provided.

Polygon (MATIC) blockchain block data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include timestamp, block number, hash, parent hash, nonce, SHA3 uncles, logs bloom, transactions root, state root, and receipts root.

Solana mainnet blockchain block and account data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block slot, block hash, block timestamp, public key, transaction signature, retrieval timestamp, executable flag, lamports, owner, and rent epoch.

Sui mainnet blockchain checkpoint data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include checkpoint digest, sequence number, epoch, timestamp, previous checkpoint digest, end of epoch flag, total gas cost, computation cost, storage cost, and storage rebate.

Tezos blockchain operation data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include level, timestamp, block hash, branch, signature, operation hash, operation group index, operation index, content index, and internal operation index.
Theta blockchain block metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include type, chain ID, epoch, height, parent hash, transactions hash, state hash, timestamp, proposer, and HCC.

Zilliqa blockchain block data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include block number, timestamp, difficulty, DS difficulty, gas price, DS leader public key, DS leader address, previous hash, signature, and block number.

Cymbal Investments financial order and trade data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include sending time, target/sender company IDs, symbol, quantity, order ID, transaction time, strike price, last price, and maturity date.

Dataflix COVID-19 county-level case data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include country name, state name, county FIPS code, county name, latitude, longitude, confirmed cases, deaths, recovered, and active cases.

Dataflix traffic safety fatality data available via Google BigQuery from NHTSA FARS. Columns include year, state, case number, total vehicles involved, vehicle forms, pedestrians involved, persons not in motor vehicles, persons in motor vehicles, and total persons.

DeepMind AlphaFold protein structure prediction data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include all versions, latest version, organism common names, UniProt start/end positions, protein names, fraction of pLDDT confident/very high, and organism synonyms.

deps.dev software dependency vulnerability data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include snapshot date, source, source ID, source URL, title, description, reference URLs, CVSS3 score, severity, and GitHub severity.
